job_description:
At Imply, our mission is to empower people and organizations to achieve more with their data. We believe that better insights lead to better decisions, and that the right technology can remove barriers, spark innovation and create lasting impact. In addition to our successful database business, we’re building the industry’s first observability warehouse, Imply Lumi. Built by the creators of Apache Druid, Lumi lets organizations store more data, support more use cases and spend less for observability. Imply Lumi is a high-performance, cost-efficient data layer built to decouple existing observability tools with zero disruption.

In this role, you will help redefine what is possible with observability and security data. As part of the Engineering Team you will play an important role in bringing Imply Lumi to life. Lumi delivers lightning fast queries, significant cost savings and seamless integration with leading observability technologies while giving customers the freedom to innovate without vendor lock-in. You will be a part of the team innovating and building this first-in-class technology that allows our customers to unlock new levels of speed, scale and value from their data.

Backed by leading investors including a16z and Bessemer Venture Partners, Imply is on a fast growth trajectory, transforming how organizations manage and gain insights from their observability and security data. Our customers, including Pepsi, Reddit, Roblox, Salesforce, and others, rely on our technology to power faster decisions, reduce costs, and unlock new possibilities. Come join a team of innovators and problem-solvers who are reshaping the future of data!

The Role

Imply is looking for a Software Engineer to build the industry’s first Observability Warehouse. The focus of this role is to build user-facing systems and services that support and enable Imply’s solution to unlock the power of open-source Apache Druid to be the go to solution for a high-performance, cost-efficient data layer for existing observability tools.

Responsibilities

• Working as part of a cross-functional team to ensure that the enterprise-grade services and interfaces we build support the needs of our product in areas of Identity, APIs, and Billing
• Collaborating closely with our product, user experience, and quality teams to quickly and iteratively deliver high value features that are scalable, accurate, and secure
• Participating in the ongoing effort of improving how we work with each iteration, as part of a collaborative team of application engineer professionals
• Writing resilient tests to cover all functional requirements and conducting security audits

Requirements

• 3+ years of API or backend development using Java or NodeJS
• Solid understanding of modern software engineering practices such as agile methodologies and CI/CD, with a deep focus on testability and quality
• Proficiency with Java is preferable, or a deep understanding of another statically-typed language for API or micro-services development
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience

Bonus Points

• Experience with authentication, authorization and security from APIs to single-page applications
• Experience with building production-grade single-page applications using Typescript and React or similar libraries (Vue, Angular, Svelte, etc)
• Experience working as part of an engineering team at a software-as-a-service based company

Job Description:

Overview: We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior UI/UX Expert to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be a UI/UX Subject Matter Expert with comprehensive expertise in Human-Centered Design (HCD) and design thinking. This role requires a candidate who can provide detailed and useful interface design specifications to development teams, ensuring the creation of intuitive, user-friendly applications.

Key Responsibilities:

• Provide subject matter expertise in UX design, offering strategic guidance grounded in Human-Centered Design and design thinking methodologies, including user research, personas, journey mapping, prototyping, mockups, and usability evaluation.

• Create and deliver a User Experience (UX) Research Plan and Outcomes for each use case, which shall include a research write-up documenting goals, anticipated outcomes, research questions, hypotheses, methodology, recruiting needs, synthesis, and next steps.

• Facilitate discovery activities, to include generative research with users and business stakeholders, an assessment of current related features, a content review, an information architecture review, an accessibility review, a business process review; and collection of any available data and analytics and provide in a User Experience Research Checklist.

• Partner with other Product Teams to ensure that the new tool or service fits into the existing structure.

• Lead the design and development of user interfaces for various applications, ensuring they are visually appealing, user-friendly, and efficient.

• Provide clear and actionable interface design specifications to development teams.

• Design dynamic forms and other complex UI components, including rich cards and drag & drop features.

• Define and maintain UX frameworks and templates for developers to use during the coding process.

• Apply insights from user experience research studies to describe product functionality, including epics and user stories, as well as operational, business, functional, technical, data, and integration requirements.

• Support design synthesis activities and generate insights and opportunities for improvement. Communicate research findings through a variety of formats (such as insight reports, stories, videos, storyboards, etc.) to maximize relevance and impact.

• Perform requirements analysis based on User Experience Research, obtaining stakeholder input from internal users and external users.

• Develop User Personas to represent user types that have wants and needs of our applications and products, and who might use our applications and products in a similar way.

• Create Customer and User Journey Maps and capture related data.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product owners, developers, and other designers.

• Conduct usability testing sessions to gather feedback on designs and apply results to refine designs.

• Write and edit plain language content for Development Teams.

• Design, test, and deliver low- and high-fidelity wireframes, prototypes, and interactive web forms, updating them as needed to support stakeholder collaboration, usability testing, facilitated demos, and iterative design improvements.

• Lead user testing sessions and conduct thorough analysis to inform design improvements.

• Establish and uphold design standards across project components.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of UI/UX designs.

• Work with ReactJS, JavaScript, CSS, HTML and Tailwind to develop and refine user interfaces.

• Design within a micro-service architecture to create scalable and maintainable solutions.

Qualifications:

• MA/MS plus 10+ years of general experience in information systems with 8+ years of specialized experience.

• HS (16+ years), AA/AS (14+ years), BA/BS (12+ years), Doctorate Degree/Ph.D. (9+ years)

• Familiarity with front-end development and specifically in ReactJS and JavaScript development.

• Familiarity with UX, information architecture, content strategy, and best practices in user centered design.

• Experience with designing software to align to strategic business needs and goals.

• Experience in conducting research for advanced technologies to determining how IT can support business needs leveraging software, hardware, or infrastructure.

• Experience in Figma or other related design tool.

• Experience in usability testing tools.

• Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to think critically.

• Strong communication skills, with the ability to articulate design concepts and decisions to stakeholders.

• Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.

• Proven track record of delivering scalable and reliable software solutions.

• A portfolio demonstrating expertise in UI/UX design and relevant projects.

• Proven experience in designing dynamic forms with a strong emphasis on intuitive user experience and efficient design.

• Extensive experience in creating CSS cards and drag & drop functionality.

• Experience on UX strategy, user researcher, user interviews, surveys, and usability study. Builds personas, user journey map, empathy maps.

• Experience on UX analysis to conduct competitive analysis, market assessments and heuristic evaluations.

• Experienced in using user feedback to inform UX improvements and guide design decisions.
